summary: German payroll simulator app (Lohn-Simulator XAL GmbH v10.0) using official PAP Lohnsteuer 2026 engine. Features: hourly wage input, night shift/dirt/holiday/meal/housing allowances, tax class and SV parameters, employer cost breakdown, Excel/PDF export, localStorage persistence, and entrepreneur KPIs.
architectural_notes: Single-file HTML app using embedded PAP Lohnsteuer 2026 engine (SqLohnsteuer + PapLohnsteuer classes with BigDecimal arithmetic)
Tax calculation: only steuerpflichtige Bezüge (L) go into PAP engine; steuerfreie (F) and pauschale (P) components are added back to net for payout
jQuery shim provided for compatibility with PAP engine's internal $ references
Export: jsPDF + jspdf-autotable for PDF, SheetJS (xlsx) for Excel
localStorage persistence with 'v10_' prefix for all input field IDs
Pauschale Lohnsteuer on Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale calculated at 16.86% as AG cost

new_feature_requests.summary: Embed the official PAP Lohnsteuer 2026 engine (BigDecimal, SqLohnsteuer, PapLohnsteuer classes as provided in the user's HTML) directly in the frontend codebase as a self-contained TypeScript/JS module so it can be called client-side without any backend round-trip.

Implement a payroll data entry section (Lohndaten Erfassung) with the following input rows, each with highlighted yellow input fields: Stundenlohn 1 (quantity hours + hourly rate), Nachtzuschlag 40% (hours), Schmutzzulage 10% (auto-calculated from base wage), Feiertag (hours), Verpflegungstage (count × €14.00 fixed rate), and Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale (direct euro amount). Display computed row amounts and a total Abrechnungs-Brutto footer.

Implement a tax and social-insurance parameter panel (Steuer- & SV-Parameter) with controls for: Steuerklasse (I–VI), Kinderfreibetrag (0–4.0 in 0.5 steps), Bundesland (all 16 German states), KV-Zusatzbeitrag % (numeric input, default 2.9), PV-Situation dropdown (kinderlos ü23, 1 Kind/u23, 2–5+ Kinder u25), Geburtsjahr (numeric), Kirchensteuer (yes/no), and a derived KiSt-Satz display (8% for BW/BY, 9% otherwise, '--' if disabled).

Implement a payroll results panel (Abrechnungsergebnis) on the right side of the layout showing: Steuer-Brutto, itemized tax deductions (Lohnsteuer, Soli, Kirchensteuer, Σ Steuerabzüge), itemized AN social-insurance deductions (RV 9.3%, AV 1.3%, KV including gesetzl. and Zusatzbeitrag sub-rows, PV, Σ SV-Abzüge), steuerfreie/pauschale Bezüge section (Nachtzuschlag, Verpflegung, Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale, Σ Steuerfrei), Abrechnungs-Netto, and a highlighted Auszahlungsbetrag box (Steuer-Netto + steuerfreie Bezüge).

Implement an employer cost breakdown section (Arbeitgeber-Anteile & Gesamtkosten) showing AG shares: RV (AG), AV (AG), KV gesetzlicher Anteil (AG), KV Zusatzbeitrag (AG), PV (AG), Insolvenzumlage, Σ AG-Sozialversicherung, pauschale LSt on Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale (16.86%), and a prominent Gesamtbelastung Arbeitgeber total (Brutto + AG-SV + pauschale LSt).

Implement an entrepreneur KPI panel (Unternehmer-Kennzahlen) showing: Kosten pro Stunde (Gesamtkosten AG ÷ Arbeitsstunden), Nettoquote (Auszahlung ÷ AG-Gesamtkosten × 100), Nebenkostenquote ((AG-SV + pauschale LSt) ÷ AG-Gesamtkosten × 100), Break-Even/Stunde (= Kosten pro Stunde), Angebot/Stunde (Break-Even × 1.20), DB1 (Umsatz mit Angebot − Abrechnungs-Brutto), and DB2 (DB1 − AG-SV − pauschale LSt).
Implement employee master data inputs (Stammdaten) for Mitarbeiter name, Personal-Nr., and Abrechnungsmonat (free text, e.g. 'März 2026'), displayed in a top bar below the main header.

Persist all user inputs (wage inputs, parameter selections, and master data fields) to localStorage on every change, and restore them on page load. Provide a RESET button that clears localStorage and reloads the page after user confirmation.

Implement an Excel export (XLSX) that generates a structured spreadsheet with sections for Brutto-Bestandteile, Steuerabzüge, Sozialversicherung (AN), Steuerfreie Bezüge, Ergebnis, and Arbeitgeber-Anteile. The filename must include the Abrechnungsmonat and Mitarbeiter name.

Implement a PDF export using jsPDF + jsPDF-AutoTable that generates a payroll document with a header (title + Mitarbeiter info), a Brutto components table, a deductions and additions table, and a final Auszahlung line. The filename must include the Abrechnungsmonat.

Apply a professional dark-slate and amber accent visual theme throughout the app: dark slate header/table headers (#1e293b / slate-800), yellow highlighted input fields, blue results panel on dark background (slate-900), amber employer costs card, green/orange KPI accents, and monospace (JetBrains Mono) for all numeric outputs. The layout must be responsive with a two-column grid (7/5 split) on desktop and single column on mobile.
